## Ingredients.IIngredientsLibraryParams.fileSources property

File tree sources to load collections from. Collections are loaded and merged with built-in collections. Duplicate collection IDs across sources cause an error.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly fileSources?: IIngredientFileTreeSource | ReadonlyArray<IIngredientFileTreeSource>;
```
